name: @netease-mini-player/v3
description: Lightweight single-JS NetEase Cloud Music player.

scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap false && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist/index.d.ts')) fs.copyFileSync('dist/index.d.ts','dist/nmpv3.d.ts')"
